name: Pate with pickled veg
description: A delicate tea sandwich featuring savory pate, often liver-based, complemented by the crisp texture and tangy flavor of assorted pickled vegetables, served on soft bread.
ingredients: Bread, pate (e.g., chicken liver, duck liver), pickled vegetables (e.g., cornichons, carrots, onions), butter or mayonnaise (optional). [Note: Specific ingredients may vary by recipe.]

additional_dietary_metadata.key_preparation_notes: Thinly sliced bread with a smooth pate spread and finely chopped or sliced pickled vegetables. Typically served chilled.
